corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

aggregation.method: twelve ordinary terminals plus two dedicated long-case terminals; one exact phase-label failure is selected only by explicit named waiver
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

dispositions.historical_named_waiver: The failed v20 staged-review.txt classification receipt remains external historical evidence and is not selected here; this current compaction receipt passes strictly.
dispositions.receipt_taxonomy_waiver: Only the user-authorized receipt taxonomy variance is accepted; anchored blocking findings and closed write/review/completion permissions remain mechanically required and pass.
dispositions.prefreeze_phase_label_waiver: Only pre-freeze-compaction metadata 181601ff5941f46f9dc8ad844835f1527ae24db3efca6336a2afe516f4684eec may retain passed=false and three milestone_phase-only oracle failures: primary contract_frozen versus expected boundary_union_reproduced. Every other primary/fresh recovery field is identical, all permissions are closed, native same-thread compaction and the independent no-summary/no-handle control are present, and the other thirteen cases strictly pass. No future receipt or other field is waived.

candidate.source_identity_note: clean semantic product candidate; later commits through this summary change only the sole ExecPlan or receipt ledger
candidate.selection_note: Every selected receipt is the sole terminal for its exact input. Thirteen pass strictly; the immutable pre-freeze receipt is selected only under the exact user-authorized milestone_phase waiver. No unchanged input was rerun or selected away.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both pinned public-0.2 receipts are reused only because runner, case, model, effort, 300-second timeout, oracle, and public package manifest recompute to the same exact input digests.
